positive_feedback: IN1: mode inference, explicit override and validate-output-mode fail-closed gate occur before the isolated modifier worker; slide/report paths preserve their own structure SSOT.

OUT1/C1-C3: modification rules prohibit whole rewrites, preserve design core/non-target regions, and require slide verify/evaluate/print or report rerender/runtime/visual evaluation. test_validate_report_visual checks missing sections, excess visuals, placeholders and CLI 0/1/2 behavior.

C4: prompt, two mode-specific rule references, three schemas, seven runtime validators/renderers and name-based worker all exist; generation/cross-deck responsibilities are delegated. plugin pytest 131 PASS.
negative_feedback: low: static acceptance strongly validates report structure/visual preservation, while exact byte-level non-target diff preservation still depends on the modifier's change report and runtime review.

notes: Meaning-preserving rubric heading correction was the only required change; design remains coherent and dependencies resolve.
